meta.source_of_truth: the PROPOSAL 039 block + the idea file (identical constants); every constant below copied verbatim from them

engine.mirror_source: tools/check-gloam.py @ d87f9ad (byte-copied whole file; the V042/V043 byte-reuse precedent; sha256 re-verified before import, run invalid on mismatch)
engine.per_frame_loop_order: spawn due indices (gl_spawn_frame; spawn_due main.c:509) -> player step (keys -> gl_player_step) -> shove verb (do_shove_verb main.c:620) -> the dead's step (step_the_dead, main.c:737 - stun decrement -> stagger unless pressed -> stride) -> contact check ends the run; barricades carry no decision role here; each night fresh at the lamppost with an empty crowd (start_night, main.c:521, which runs spawn_due once so index 0 stands before the first frame)

constants.wave_rule: gl_wave_count(n) = min(2n-1, 24); gl_spawn_frame(n, i) = i*2400 // gl_wave_count(n)

policies.IDLE: regression leg only (proof 2's bound and range reproduced exactly); not a census policy

KITE_PERIM.waypoints_note: clockwise loop on the 24 px-inset rectangle; initial target = waypoint index 0 = (40,56)
KITE_PERIM.move_rule: per-axis signed move toward the current waypoint, deadzone GL_ONE/2 = 128 subpx per axis
KITE_PERIM.advance_rule: waypoint advances (one step, checked once per frame before key choice) when Chebyshev(player, waypoint) <= 2 px = 512 subpx

KITE_GRAD.rule: myopic evader: all 9 key-sets scored through gl_player_step; score = min over live Shamblers of Chebyshev to the moved point; max wins

policies.SHOVE_variants: SHOVE-PERIM / SHOVE-GRAD = the same movement plus A whenever the observed cooldown is 0 and the observed nearest Shambler is within GL_SHOVE_RANGE (Chebyshev <= 6144); an attempt arms the cooldown hit or whiff (main.c do_shove_verb: cooldown pre-decremented each frame before the press check; nearest = lowest index at strictly smallest Chebyshev)
policies.observation_timing: policies (and the noise layer) read the frame-start state: positions/stun/cooldown as of the end of the previous frame, BEFORE this frame's spawn_due - the keys-scanned-at-loop-top semantics of main.c; one key-set per frame, exactly the input surface the ROM accepts

oil_legs.LIT: oil_for_press = GL_OIL_MAX = 10800: gl_dark_press identically 0 - the pre-slice-7 chase
oil_legs.DARK: oil_for_press = 0: any Shambler beyond gl_light_radius(0) = GL_LIGHT_R_MIN = 6144 subpx (24 px) never staggers (press cancels the stagger); press distance measured on pre-stride positions, exactly step_the_dead's own read

arm_d.note: deterministic census, ZERO RNG; game seeds are enumerated fixture inputs, NOT registry seeds
metrics_per_cell: SURV (fraction of seeds surviving the full 3600-frame night)
arm_d.loop_order: policy (family order as listed), oil (LIT, DARK), night ascending, seed ascending

arm_s.note: seeded execution noise - the human-hands bracket; A press unperturbed (kite policies carry no A)
arm_s.noise_rule: each frame w.p. eps the policy's chosen key-set is replaced by a uniform draw over the 9 key-sets; ONE random.random() per frame (drawn every frame, frame order): fires iff u < eps; replacement index = min(8, int(u / eps * 9)) into keyset_deltas tie_order indexing (u/eps is uniform on [0,1) given fire)
arm_s.loop_order: policy, oil, night, eps, seed, replication - one sequential stream per registry seed, consumed in exactly this order
arm_s.metrics: survival share per (policy, oil, night, eps) leg

registry_seeds.aux_rule: never read by any decision number; ZERO draws asserted
registry_seeds.note: allocated strictly above the P038 registry high-water 20261292; nothing above 20261296 drawn

decision.REJECT: KITE-PERIM at LIT survives >= 99/100 of census seeds at EVERY decision night {13, 16, 20, 24} AND the eps = 1/16 noisy KITE-PERIM at night 24 LIT survives >= 90/100 of replications (main leg, 32 seeds x M = 32 = 1024 replications)
decision.APPROVE: EVERY swept policy (KITE-PERIM, SHOVE-PERIM, KITE-GRAD, SHOVE-GRAD - incl. SHOVE-GRAD) posts SURV < 50/100 at some decision night (within its own swept night set) in BOTH oil legs, stability-reproduced
decision.NULL: anything else - the conditional finding is the citable pin; flip axes named via per-axis survival shares; cheapest live probe named: the lane's own committed route files plus the battery's EARNED best-nights record (proof 20: best = 1, seed 118)
decision.comparisons: exact fractions.Fraction on survival counts - no float touches any decision comparison

gates.mirror_sha256: re-verified before import; run invalid on mismatch
gates.constants_cross_check: every engine constant above asserted equal to the imported mirror's module constant
gates.idle_regression: proof 2's own bound and range reproduced exactly (seeds 0..63 x nights 1..4, index-0 spawn, zombie_id 0, contact-before-step, monotone non-increasing Chebyshev, contact within 400 frames) PLUS the registered every-spawn extension (every scheduled index of those nights, zombie_id = index): monotone non-increasing Chebyshev and contact within 400 frames from every spawn
gates.spawn_identities: on every census spawn: fence-perimeter membership, >= 64 px (16384 subpx) from the lamppost (proof 1's predicate), gl_wave_count == min(2n-1, 24) exact, spawn frames non-decreasing and < 2400
gates.stagger_rate: mean over the pinned (id, frame) grid ids 0..23 x frames 0..3599 (86400 cells) within 3 sigma of 1/4, sigma = sqrt((1/4)(3/4)/86400); AND zero no-stride (stagger) events among DARK-leg unstunned steps with pre-stride distance > 24 px, counted on every leg
gates.press_dominance: proof 11d reproduced exactly on its committed range (seeds 0..63 x nights 1..4, index-0 spawn, zombie_id 0, oil 0 vs lit, 400-frame bound): the pressed chase never reaches contact later than the lit chase from the same spawn, both monotone and bounded
gates.sentinels: per-leg frame-count and draw-count sentinels: Arm S draws counted by an independent wrapper == sum of per-run executed frames per leg; aux seed ZERO draws; Arm D total frames recorded
gates.twin_engines: the optimized census engine reproduces the mirror-functions-only reference engine (independently written, structured line-for-line on main.c) exactly - death frame, min-gap, shove connects, final crowd positions - on the pinned subsample: every (policy, oil) at night 13 seeds {0, 17, 31} and night 24 seed {5}, plus noise replay equivalence at (KITE-PERIM, LIT, 24, eps 1/16, seed 0, fixed probe stream)
gates.twin_evaluators: two independently-written decision evaluators agree on the class, on both the main and the stability input sets
gates.byte_identity: stdout + results.json byte-identical across two full process runs by external diff (no wall-clock in any output)

conventions.death_frame: frames elapsed at contact = frame index f (0-based) + 1, in 1..3600; survival recorded as death_frame 0
conventions.median_rule: median of the sorted death-frame list = element at index (n-1)//2 (lower middle for even n)
conventions.quartile_rule: min-gap quartiles q1/q2/q3 = sorted per-run min-gap values at indices (n-1)//4, (n-1)//2, (3*(n-1))//4; all runs of the cell included (deaths and survivals)
conventions.min_gap: per run: minimum over frames of the minimum over the crowd of Chebyshev(player, Shambler), measured post-step at the contact-check point, in subpixels
conventions.surv: exact Fraction survivors/n_seeds (Arm D) or survivors/(seeds*M) (Arm S)
